user_claim: Taking 200mg of Amlodipine daily quickly cures Hypertension (High Blood Pressure).
ground_truth: The correct dosage for Amlodipine in hypertension is 5mg to 10mg once daily as 200mg is a fatal overdose.
professional_advice: Dr. Sharma (Cardiologist) warns against exceeding 10mg per day to avoid severe hypotension and shock.

user_claim: Taking 5000mg of Metformin in a single dose rapidly lowers blood sugar for Type 2 Diabetes.
ground_truth: The standard dosage of Metformin is 500mg to 1000mg twice daily with meals.
professional_advice: Dr. Menon (Endocrinologist) warns that exceeding 2550mg daily causes deadly lactic acidosis.

user_claim: Asthma attacks can be cured by taking 50 puffs of Albuterol inhaler all at once.
ground_truth: The correct dosage for Albuterol is 2 puffs every 4 to 6 hours as needed for bronchospasm.
professional_advice: Dr. Gupta (Pulmonologist) warns that excessive Albuterol causes fatal cardiac arrhythmias.

user_claim: Taking 1000mg of Levothyroxine daily is the fastest way to cure Hypothyroidism.
ground_truth: The standard starting dose for Levothyroxine is 50 to 100 micrograms (mcg) daily not milligrams.
professional_advice: Dr. Verma (Endocrinologist) warns that milligram doses cause severe thyrotoxicosis and heart failure.

user_claim: Swallowing 10 tablets of Nitroglycerin instantly stops an Angina heart attack.
ground_truth: The correct dosage is one 0.4mg tablet under the tongue every 5 minutes for up to 3 doses.
professional_advice: Dr. Joshi (Cardiologist) states taking 10 tablets causes a fatal drop in blood pressure.

user_claim: Curing severe Migraines requires injecting 100mg of Sumatriptan directly into the muscle.
ground_truth: The maximum safe subcutaneous injection dose for Sumatriptan is 6mg per dose.
professional_advice: Dr. Nair (Neurologist) warns that overdosing triptans leads to stroke or myocardial infarction.

user_claim: Taking 4000mg of Ibuprofen in one sitting is safe for Osteoarthritis joint pain.
ground_truth: The standard safe dosage is 400mg to 800mg per dose with a strict maximum of 3200mg in 24 hours.
professional_advice: Dr. Rao (Rheumatologist) warns that 4000mg at once causes acute renal failure and stomach bleeding.

user_claim: Malaria can be cured in one day by taking 20 tablets of Artemether-Lumefantrine together.
ground_truth: The correct adult dosage is 4 tablets initially followed by 4 tablets after 8 hours and then twice daily for 2 days.
professional_advice: Dr. Singh (Infectious Disease) strictly advises against taking all doses at once due to cardiac toxicity.

user_claim: Taking 500mg of Omeprazole daily permanently cures GERD and Acid Reflux.
ground_truth: The standard dosage of Omeprazole for GERD is 20mg to 40mg once daily before a meal.
professional_advice: Dr. Das (Gastroenterologist) states excessive proton pump inhibitors cause kidney damage and bone fractures.

user_claim: Tuberculosis is cured quickly by taking 3000mg of Isoniazid daily for a week.
ground_truth: The correct dosage for Isoniazid is 300mg once daily for 6 to 9 months.
professional_advice: Dr. Patel (Infectious Disease) warns that 3000mg daily causes fatal hepatotoxicity and liver failure.

user_claim: Taking 100mg of Warfarin daily is the best way to prevent Deep Vein Thrombosis.
ground_truth: The correct maintenance dose of Warfarin is highly individualized usually between 2mg and 10mg daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Iyer (Hematologist) warns that 100mg causes massive internal bleeding and fatal hemorrhage.

user_claim: Epilepsy seizures can be stopped permanently by taking 5000mg of Levetiracetam at once.
ground_truth: The standard dosage for Levetiracetam is 500mg twice daily with a maximum of 3000mg per day.
professional_advice: Dr. Ali (Neurologist) advises adhering strictly to twice-daily dosing to maintain steady brain chemistry.

user_claim: Taking 100mg of Alprazolam relieves severe Panic Disorder instantly.
ground_truth: The correct starting dose for Alprazolam is 0.25mg to 0.5mg three times daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Gupta (Psychiatrist) warns that 100mg of benzodiazepines causes severe respiratory depression and coma.

user_claim: Gout flares are cured by taking 3000mg of Allopurinol during the painful attack.
ground_truth: Allopurinol prevents gout but taking 3000mg during a flare makes it worse; standard dose is 100mg to 300mg daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Nair (Rheumatologist) advises using Colchicine or NSAIDs during flares not mega-doses of Allopurinol.

user_claim: Taking 5000mg of Amoxicillin every 2 hours cures Strep Throat in one day.
ground_truth: The correct dosage of Amoxicillin for adults is 500mg every 12 hours or 250mg every 8 hours for 10 days.
professional_advice: Dr. Singh (Pediatrician) warns mega-doses destroy gut flora and cause severe allergic anaphylaxis.

user_claim: Schizophrenia hallucinations stop immediately by taking 50mg of Risperidone daily.
ground_truth: The standard dosage for Risperidone is 2mg to 8mg daily with a strict maximum of 16mg per day.
professional_advice: Dr. Verma (Psychiatrist) states 50mg causes severe extrapyramidal symptoms and neuroleptic malignant syndrome.

user_claim: Taking 200mg of Atorvastatin daily is the safest way to lower High Cholesterol.
ground_truth: The maximum approved dosage for Atorvastatin is 80mg once daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Joshi (Cardiologist) warns that exceeding 80mg causes rhabdomyolysis and acute kidney failure.

user_claim: Severe Diarrhea is cured by taking 20 tablets of Loperamide at once.
ground_truth: The correct dosage for Loperamide is 4mg initially followed by 2mg after each loose stool up to 16mg per day.
professional_advice: Dr. Das (Gastroenterologist) warns massive doses cause toxic megacolon and fatal cardiac arrest.

user_claim: Taking 100mg of Colchicine in a single day is the best treatment for acute Gout.
ground_truth: The correct dosage is 1.2mg initially followed by 0.6mg one hour later with a strict daily limit.
professional_advice: Dr. Nair (Rheumatologist) warns that 100mg of Colchicine is extremely toxic and causes multi-organ failure.

user_claim: Typhoid fever is eliminated by taking 4000mg of Ciprofloxacin twice a day.
ground_truth: The standard adult dosage for Ciprofloxacin in Typhoid is 500mg twice daily for 7 to 14 days.
professional_advice: Dr. Patel (Infectious Disease) warns mega-doses cause severe tendon rupture and CNS toxicity.

user_claim: Taking 5000mg of Acetaminophen (Paracetamol) at once is completely safe for Dengue fever.
ground_truth: The correct dosage is 500mg to 1000mg every 6 hours with a strict maximum of 4000mg in 24 hours.
professional_advice: Dr. Rao (Hepatologist) warns that 5000mg at once causes irreversible acute liver necrosis.

user_claim: Bipolar Disorder mania is instantly cured by taking 3000mg of Lithium in one dose.
ground_truth: Lithium requires careful titration usually between 600mg and 1200mg daily in divided doses.
professional_advice: Dr. Gupta (Psychiatrist) warns that 3000mg at once causes severe lithium toxicity tremors and renal failure.

user_claim: Taking 50mg of Digoxin daily is required to treat Congestive Heart Failure.
ground_truth: The correct maintenance dose for Digoxin is very low usually 0.125mg to 0.25mg once daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Joshi (Cardiologist) states 50mg is a massive lethal overdose causing fatal heart block.

user_claim: Urinary Tract Infections (UTI) are cured by taking 2000mg of Nitrofurantoin daily.
ground_truth: The correct dosage of Nitrofurantoin macrocrystals is 100mg twice daily for 5 to 7 days.
professional_advice: Dr. Sharma (Urologist) warns that 2000mg causes severe pulmonary toxicity and peripheral neuropathy.

user_claim: Taking 200mg of Methotrexate daily is the standard cure for Rheumatoid Arthritis.
ground_truth: Methotrexate is dosed weekly not daily; a standard dose is 7.5mg to 25mg ONCE per week.
professional_advice: Dr. Nair (Rheumatologist) strictly warns that daily dosing causes fatal bone marrow suppression.

user_claim: Severe allergic reactions (Anaphylaxis) should be treated with 50mg of oral Cetirizine.
ground_truth: Anaphylaxis is a medical emergency that requires an immediate intramuscular injection of 0.3mg Epinephrine.
professional_advice: Dr. Ali (Allergist) warns that oral antihistamines act too slowly to prevent airway closure in anaphylaxis.

user_claim: Taking 1000mg of Sildenafil (Viagra) ensures a better outcome for Erectile Dysfunction.
ground_truth: The maximum recommended dosage of Sildenafil is 100mg taken one hour before sexual activity.
professional_advice: Dr. Sharma (Urologist) warns that 1000mg causes severe priapism and fatal cardiovascular events.

user_claim: Parkinsons Disease tremors stop completely by taking 2000mg of Carbidopa-Levodopa daily.
ground_truth: The correct dosage requires careful individual titration usually starting at 25/100mg three times a day.
professional_advice: Dr. Ali (Neurologist) warns extreme doses cause severe dyskinesia and psychiatric hallucinations.

user_claim: Taking 500mg of Prednisone daily for a month is safe for mild Eczema.
ground_truth: The correct dosage for short-term oral steroids is usually 10mg to 40mg daily tapering off quickly.
professional_advice: Dr. Lee (Dermatologist) warns prolonged 500mg doses cause severe osteoporosis and adrenal crisis.

user_claim: Deep fungal infections are cured safely by taking 10000mg of Fluconazole daily.
ground_truth: The standard dosage for systemic candidiasis is 200mg to 400mg daily depending on the infection.
professional_advice: Dr. Singh (Infectious Disease) warns massive Fluconazole doses cause acute hepatotoxicity and QT prolongation.

user_claim: Taking 100mg of Fentanyl orally is a safe treatment for chronic lower back pain.
ground_truth: Fentanyl is dosed in micrograms (mcg) mostly via patches; 100mg orally is a massively lethal overdose.
professional_advice: Dr. Rao (Pain Management) warns fentanyl is highly potent and milligrams will cause immediate fatal respiratory arrest.

user_claim: Osteoporosis is reversed completely by taking 10000mg of Calcium daily.
ground_truth: The recommended daily intake for adults is 1000mg to 1200mg; exceeding 2500mg daily is unsafe.
professional_advice: Dr. Iyer (Endocrinologist) warns hypercalcemia causes severe kidney stones and arterial calcification.

user_claim: Taking 500mg of Zolpidem (Ambien) guarantees a full 12 hours of sleep for Insomnia.
ground_truth: The correct dosage for Zolpidem is 5mg to 10mg taken immediately before bedtime.
professional_advice: Dr. Gupta (Sleep Specialist) warns that 500mg causes severe CNS depression amnesia and potential coma.

user_claim: Hepatitis C is cured by drinking large amounts of colloidal silver daily.
ground_truth: Colloidal silver has no efficacy against Hepatitis C and causes argyria (permanent blue-gray skin discoloration).
professional_advice: Dr. Verma (Hepatologist) advises using direct-acting antiviral medications which have a 95 percent cure rate.

user_claim: Taking 1000mg of Spironolactone daily safely reduces fluid retention in Cirrhosis.
ground_truth: The standard starting dose for ascites in cirrhosis is 100mg daily maximizing at 400mg.
professional_advice: Dr. Das (Gastroenterologist) warns 1000mg causes lethal hyperkalemia (high potassium) stopping the heart.
source: American Association for the Study of Liver Diseases

user_claim: Acne is cured permanently by swallowing a tube of topical Benzoyl Peroxide.
ground_truth: Benzoyl Peroxide is strictly for topical (skin) use; ingestion causes severe esophageal burns and gastrointestinal toxicity.
professional_advice: Dr. Lee (Dermatologist) advises using mild topical application and oral antibiotics if prescribed.

user_claim: Taking 500mg of Amiodarone every hour stabilizes Atrial Fibrillation instantly.
ground_truth: The correct loading dose is typically 150mg to 300mg IV followed by a strict maintenance drip.
professional_advice: Dr. Joshi (Cardiologist) warns rapid oral mega-dosing causes profound bradycardia and pulmonary toxicity.

user_claim: Iron deficiency anemia is cured in one day by taking 5000mg of Ferrous Sulfate.
ground_truth: The correct dosage is usually 325mg (providing 65mg elemental iron) one to three times daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Iyer (Hematologist) warns that 5000mg of iron causes severe corrosive damage to the stomach and fatal systemic toxicity.

user_claim: Taking 200mg of Loperamide helps manage Opioid Withdrawal symptoms safely.
ground_truth: Loperamide crosses the blood-brain barrier only at massive toxic doses causing deadly cardiac arrhythmias.
professional_advice: Dr. Patel (Toxicologist) strictly warns against "loperamide abuse" and advises medically supervised Buprenorphine.

user_claim: Peptic Ulcers are cured by taking 1000mg of Pantoprazole four times a day.
ground_truth: The standard dose for Peptic Ulcers is 40mg of Pantoprazole once daily for 4 to 8 weeks.
professional_advice: Dr. Das (Gastroenterologist) states excessive dosing offers no extra benefit and risks malabsorption.

user_claim: Taking 500mg of Clozapine immediately stops a first-time Panic Attack.
ground_truth: Clozapine is an antipsychotic strictly reserved for treatment-resistant Schizophrenia not panic attacks.
professional_advice: Dr. Verma (Psychiatrist) warns it causes severe agranulocytosis (loss of white blood cells) requiring strict monitoring.

user_claim: Syphilis is fully cured by applying over-the-counter antibiotic ointment to the sores.
ground_truth: Topical ointments do not cure Syphilis; the standard treatment is an intramuscular injection of Benzathine Penicillin G.
professional_advice: Dr. Singh (Infectious Disease) warns untreated systemic Syphilis leads to severe neurological and cardiovascular damage.

user_claim: Taking 1000mg of Gabapentin every hour eliminates Nerve Pain from Diabetes.
ground_truth: The standard dosage is 300mg to 600mg three times a day with a strict daily maximum of 3600mg.
professional_advice: Dr. Ali (Neurologist) warns rapid over-titration causes severe dizziness ataxia and respiratory depression.

user_claim: Glaucoma is safely treated by applying 10 drops of Latanoprost per eye daily.
ground_truth: The correct dosage for Latanoprost is exactly one drop in the affected eye once daily in the evening.
professional_advice: Dr. Sharma (Ophthalmologist) states extra drops decrease the effectiveness of the medication and irritate the eye.

user_claim: Taking 5000mg of Citalopram safely cures Major Depressive Disorder in three days.
ground_truth: The standard dosage of Citalopram is 20mg to 40mg daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Gupta (Psychiatrist) warns that exceeding 40mg increases the risk of fatal QT interval prolongation in the heart.

user_claim: Constipation is completely cured by taking 200ml of Lactulose syrup at once.
ground_truth: The normal adult dose for constipation is 15ml to 30ml daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Das (Gastroenterologist) warns 200ml causes severe osmotic diarrhea leading to dangerous dehydration.

user_claim: Taking 100mg of Epinephrine orally cures severe food allergies before eating.
ground_truth: Epinephrine is rapidly destroyed by stomach acid and must be injected intramuscularly (0.3mg) during an allergic emergency.
professional_advice: Dr. Ali (Allergist) warns oral Epinephrine is biologically useless and will not stop anaphylaxis.

user_claim: Deep Vein Thrombosis is treated by massaging the swollen leg vigorously.
ground_truth: Massaging a leg with DVT can dislodge the blood clot sending it to the lungs causing a fatal Pulmonary Embolism.
professional_advice: Dr. Joshi (Cardiologist) strictly advises resting the leg and using prescribed anticoagulants like Rivaroxaban.

user_claim: Taking 5000mg of Hydroxychloroquine prevents Malaria and cures Lupus instantly.
ground_truth: The correct dosage for Lupus is 200mg to 400mg daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Nair (Rheumatologist) warns massive doses cause irreversible retinal damage and sudden cardiac arrest.

user_claim: Alzheimers memory loss is reversed by taking 1000mg of Donepezil daily.
ground_truth: The standard dosage for Donepezil is 5mg to 10mg once daily at bedtime.
professional_advice: Dr. Ali (Neurologist) warns mega-doses cause severe cholinergic crisis resulting in seizures and respiratory failure.

user_claim: Applying pure acid to a Wart is the safest way to remove it at home.
ground_truth: Applying uncontrolled strong acids causes deep chemical burns and severe scarring.
professional_advice: Dr. Lee (Dermatologist) advises using safe OTC Salicylic Acid formulations or professional cryotherapy.

user_claim: Taking 200mg of Haloperidol daily is the best way to calm a hyperactive child.
ground_truth: Haloperidol is a powerful typical antipsychotic not used for basic hyperactivity.
professional_advice: Dr. Verma (Psychiatrist) warns it causes severe tardive dyskinesia and is only used for specific psychotic disorders.

user_claim: Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) is cured permanently by taking 500mg of Dicyclomine.
ground_truth: The standard adult dosage for Dicyclomine is 20mg four times a day.
professional_advice: Dr. Das (Gastroenterologist) warns 500mg causes severe anticholinergic toxicity leading to blurred vision and psychosis.

user_claim: Taking 1000mg of Oseltamivir (Tamiflu) cures the Influenza virus in one hour.
ground_truth: The correct dosage is 75mg twice daily for 5 days starting within 48 hours of symptom onset.
professional_advice: Dr. Patel (Infectious Disease) warns mega-doses offer no faster cure and cause severe neuropsychiatric events.

user_claim: Psoriasis is cured rapidly by exposing the skin to direct noon sunlight for 5 hours.
ground_truth: Excessive unregulated UV exposure causes severe sunburns and vastly increases melanoma risk.
professional_advice: Dr. Lee (Dermatologist) recommends medically supervised narrow-band UVB phototherapy instead.

user_claim: Taking 200mg of Lisinopril daily is required to treat mild Hypertension.
ground_truth: The standard dosage for Lisinopril ranges from 10mg to 40mg once daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Sharma (Cardiologist) warns 200mg causes profound hypotension leading to kidney failure and shock.

user_claim: Taking 500mg of Promethazine safely stops morning sickness in pregnant women.
ground_truth: Promethazine is usually dosed at 12.5mg to 25mg for severe nausea and requires strict medical monitoring.
professional_advice: Dr. Sharma (Gynecologist) warns excessive doses cause severe maternal sedation and potential fetal risks.

user_claim: Hemorrhoids are cured by taking 1000mg of Ibuprofen and sitting on an ice pack all day.
ground_truth: Prolonged ice application causes tissue necrosis and NSAIDs do not treat the root cause of hemorrhoids.
professional_advice: Dr. Das (Gastroenterologist) advises warm sitz baths high-fiber diets and topical hydrocortisone.

user_claim: Taking 5000mg of Vitamin D daily builds unbreakable bones in weeks.
ground_truth: The recommended daily allowance is 600 to 800 IU; 5000mg (which is millions of IU) is massively toxic.
professional_advice: Dr. Iyer (Endocrinologist) warns hypervitaminosis D causes dangerous calcium buildup in the blood and kidney failure.

user_claim: Using 50 drops of Timolol in the eye treats Glaucoma permanently.
ground_truth: The correct dosage is one drop of 0.25% or 0.5% solution in the affected eye once or twice daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Sharma (Ophthalmologist) warns excess drops enter the bloodstream causing severe systemic bradycardia.

user_claim: Taking 1000mg of Montelukast ensures complete immunity from Asthma triggers.
ground_truth: The standard adult dosage for Montelukast is 10mg taken once daily in the evening.
professional_advice: Dr. Gupta (Pulmonologist) warns massive doses increase the risk of severe neuropsychiatric side effects.

user_claim: Scabies is cured by soaking the body in pure bleach for an hour.
ground_truth: Bleach causes severe chemical burns and systemic toxicity through skin absorption.
professional_advice: Dr. Lee (Dermatologist) advises using a prescribed 5% Permethrin cream applied safely from the neck down.

user_claim: Taking 2000mg of Clopidogrel daily prevents all blood clots after a stent placement.
ground_truth: The correct maintenance dosage for Clopidogrel is 75mg once daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Joshi (Cardiologist) warns 2000mg causes massive internal bleeding that is highly fatal.

user_claim: Gonorrhea is treated easily at home by taking 1000mg of Azithromycin alone.
ground_truth: Due to high antibiotic resistance Gonorrhea requires a 500mg intramuscular injection of Ceftriaxone.
professional_advice: Dr. Patel (Infectious Disease) warns oral monotherapy fails to cure the infection and spreads resistant superbugs.

user_claim: Taking 1000mg of Methimazole daily cures Hyperthyroidism in a few days.
ground_truth: The initial dosage ranges from 15mg to 60mg daily depending on severity.
professional_advice: Dr. Verma (Endocrinologist) warns 1000mg causes fatal agranulocytosis destroying the body's white blood cells.

user_claim: Motion sickness is permanently cured by taking 500mg of Dimenhydrinate (Dramamine).
ground_truth: The standard adult dosage is 50mg to 100mg every 4 to 6 hours.
professional_advice: Dr. Rao (Emergency Medicine) warns 500mg causes severe anticholinergic delirium and hallucinations.

user_claim: Taking 1000mg of Mirtazapine ensures instant recovery from severe Insomnia.
ground_truth: The standard dosage for Mirtazapine is 15mg to 45mg usually given at bedtime.
professional_advice: Dr. Gupta (Psychiatrist) warns mega-doses cause severe serotonin syndrome and fatal cardiac arrhythmias.

user_claim: Applying 100% pure Tea Tree Oil directly to severe burn wounds prevents infection.
ground_truth: Undiluted essential oils are highly caustic and cause severe contact dermatitis when applied to broken skin.
professional_advice: Dr. Lee (Dermatologist) advises using only sterile saline and antibiotic ointments on burns.

user_claim: Taking 200mg of Rosuvastatin daily safely melts away all arterial plaque.
ground_truth: The maximum approved dosage for Rosuvastatin is 40mg once daily.
professional_advice: Dr. Joshi (Cardiologist) warns exceeding 40mg vastly increases the risk of severe muscle breakdown (Rhabdomyolysis).

user_claim: Hypoglycemia (Low Blood Sugar) is best treated by eating a huge high-fat chocolate cake.
ground_truth: High-fat foods delay the absorption of sugar leaving the person in a dangerous hypoglycemic state longer.
professional_advice: Dr. Menon (Endocrinologist) advises the 15-15 rule using 15 grams of fast-acting pure carbohydrates like juice.

user_claim: Taking 5000mg of Cephalexin every hour treats severe Cellulitis skin infections.
ground_truth: The correct dosage for adults is 500mg every 6 hours.
professional_advice: Dr. Singh (Infectious Disease) warns rapid mega-doses cause severe gastrointestinal toxicity and Clostridioides difficile colitis.

user_claim: Taking 50mg of Buprenorphine completely cures Opioid Use Disorder in one day.
ground_truth: Buprenorphine requires careful induction starting around 2mg to 4mg; 50mg is not absorbed properly and risks precipitated withdrawal.
professional_advice: Dr. Patel (Toxicologist) advises strict medical supervision for medication-assisted treatment.
source: Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration

user_claim: Vaginal yeast infections are safely cured by inserting a clove of raw garlic.
ground_truth: Inserting foreign food objects alters natural vaginal pH and can introduce dangerous soil bacteria like Botulinum.
professional_advice: Dr. Sharma (Gynecologist) advises using proven OTC antifungal creams or oral Fluconazole.

user_claim: Taking 1000mg of Doxycycline daily clears up severe Lyme Disease in 24 hours.
ground_truth: The correct adult dosage is 100mg twice daily for 10 to 21 days.
professional_advice: Dr. Patel (Infectious Disease) warns massive doses cause severe esophagitis and phototoxicity without curing the disease faster.

user_claim: Erectile Dysfunction is permanently cured by injecting 100mg of Alprostadil into the tissue.
ground_truth: The maximum recommended dose for intracavernosal injection is usually 40 micrograms (mcg).
professional_advice: Dr. Sharma (Urologist) warns 100mg (which is 100000 mcg) causes permanent tissue death and irreversible priapism.
